title: The Beautiful Stranger
content: While waiting for his train, Daniel noticed a woman reading a novel on the platform. She looked up for a moment and smiled politely before returning to her book. Daniel wanted to speak with her but felt too shy. When the train arrived, they sat across from each other. Finally, he asked about the book she was reading. Her name was Chloe, and they talked during the entire journey. By the time the train stopped, they had already planned to meet again.
